title: Britain Announces Social Media Ban for Children
summary_full: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said his government planned to bar children under 16 from social media, following policies in Australia and elsewhere.
summary_public: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said his government planned to bar children under 16 from social media, following policies in Australia and elsewhere.
